What this is

A preview of a duplicate-ready Notion client tracker organized around the public workflow visible on the site.

Public workflow used

For more information please fill in the contact form below and we will contact you shortly, compassionate and personalized lactation support tailored to each family's specific needs and goals, in-home or virtual lactation support from certified Lactation Consultant, Kavisa Wood, IBCLC, latching techniques, pumping, bottle refusal, tethered oral ties, oral habilitation and milk supply

Today ops snapshot Consult + visit board Parent record Intake + Consult View Feeding Cadence + Weight Check View Follow-up + Class Enrollment View Setup Map

Why this shape

From overview to usable workspace

The first screenshots show the main views. The later screenshots show the editable structure that would be delivered: fields, focused tables, individual client pages, and starter records.

What it helps with

  • Every IntakeQ booking and contact-form inquiry lands in one row with its own insurance, distance, and service-type lane
  • Initial consult, weight check, and oral-habilitation follow-ups live on the same record as the first message — no parallel inbox threads
  • Prenatal breastfeeding class roster and 1:1 lactation follow-ups share one board so no one slips between the two rosters
